programme.title: Sonchiriya
programme.desc: A band of dacoits, on the run, help two women escape their murderous family.

programme.title: U-Turn
programme.desc: While investigating accidents on a flyover, an intern journalist is accused of murder.

programme.title: Mere Pyare Prime Minister
programme.desc: Kannu writes a letter to the prime minister of India after his mother is raped.

programme.title: Qarib Qarib Singlle
programme.desc: Jaya and Yogi, two contrasting personalities, set out to retrace past relationships, sparking the most eventful trip of their lives.

programme.title: Zero
programme.desc: A vertically-challenged bachelor with a larger-than-life personality discovers his life's purpose through his relationships with two wildly different women.

programme.title: Sarkar 3
programme.desc: Determined to protect public interest and his own authority, Sarkar finds himself locked in a cat-and-mouse game with his adversaries, both external and internal.

programme.title: Phone Bhoot
programme.desc: Inspired by stories from their childhood, two young men create a business around capturing ghosts. However, their endeavour turns dangerous when they must fulfil their promise to a poltergeist.

programme.title: Badla
programme.desc: Naina, a married entrepreneur, tries to prove her innocence in the death of her lover.

programme.title: The Tashkent Files
programme.desc: Following the death of Lal Bahadur Shastri, a team launches a probe into the conspiracy.

programme.title: The Kashmir Files
programme.desc: A young college student sets out to uncover the truth behind his parents' death.

programme.title: Toofaan
programme.desc: An orphan meets a young woman who encourages him to pursue his passion for boxing.

programme.title: Akaash Vani
programme.desc: Akaash and Vani love each other but she is forced to marry Ravi, an abusive man.

programme.title: Joggers' Park
programme.desc: Chaos erupt when former judge Jyotin Chatterjee falls for Jenny, a young woman.

programme.title: The Last Color
programme.desc: A young tightrope walker befriends a widow who wishes to play Holi but cannot do so..

programme.title: Daddy
programme.desc: Arun Gawli becomes one of India's most notable gangsters before he ventures into politics.

programme.title: Poorna
programme.desc: Poorna Malavath, a 13-year-old girl from Telangana, becomes the youngest female in history to climb and reach the summit of Mount Everest.

programme.title: Attack
programme.desc: Arjun participates in an experiment to defend the nation from terrorists and seek revenge.

programme.title: Vicky Donor
programme.desc: Vicky works as a sperm donor for Dr Baldev Chaddha and boosts the clinic's success.

programme.title: Judgementall Hai Kya
programme.desc: Bobby rents out a portion of her house to a young couple but is suspicious of the man.

programme.title: Happy Bhag Jayegi
programme.desc: An Indian runaway bride mistakenly arrives at the home of a Pakistani politician.

programme.title: Bareilly Ki Barfi
programme.desc: After reading a book that reflects her life, Bitti sets out to find its author.

programme.title: Badlapur
programme.desc: An ordinary man's hunger for revenge gradually turns him into a cold-blooded murderer.

programme.title: Aakhri Chaal : Ab kaun bachega
programme.desc: Three brothers conspire against each other in a bid to take over their father's criminal empire following his sudden death. Meanwhile, someone else tries to take advantage of the rift between them.

programme.title: Triple R Rocky Rahul Rambo
programme.desc: Three students, who fail their exams and waste their time, befriend a girl their college. They devise a plan to help her but it leads to various problems.

programme.title: Dharam Sankat Mein
programme.desc: Dharampal, a 55-year-old man, discovers that he was born Muslim and was adopted by his Hindu family. His life is thrown into upheaval as he does not know which religion to follow.

programme.title: Rangoon
programme.desc: Julia journeys to the Indo-Burma border to perform for the troops during World War II, on the insistence of Billimoria, her lover. There, she finds herself enamoured by Jemadar Malik, a soldier.

programme.title: Creature 3D
programme.desc: Ahana decides to open up a luxury hotel in the woods of Glendale, Himachal Pradesh. But, when a mysterious creature starts killing the guests at her hotel, it is up to her to find a way to kill it.

programme.title: Rudhran
programme.desc: A man's life takes an unexpected turn when he stumbles upon a criminal network. Determined to bring the truth to light, he sets out to expose the nefarious organisation and protect his loved ones.

programme.title: Siren 108
programme.desc: A cat-and-mouse chase unfolds after a tainted police officer zeroes in on Thilaga Varman, an ambulance driver turned criminal and parolee suspected in a series of murders.

programme.title: Queen
programme.desc: Rani is devastated after her fiance leaves her just before the wedding. Undeterred, she decides to go on their honeymoon alone where she gets pulled out of her comfort zone and rediscovers herself.

programme.title: Darbar
programme.desc: Aaditya, a high-ranking law enforcement official, sets out to eradicate the city's gangsters. As the events unfold, it becomes clear that his motivations are deeply personal.

programme.title: Inspector Vijay
programme.desc: Vijay, an honest police officer, meets Samyukta at a cafe and falls in love with her. However, his life changes when he witnesses a kidnapping and ends up helping a lonely woman, Lavanya.

programme.title: Hundred
programme.desc: The battle at Edgbaston will see the Birmingham Phoenix's Liam Livingstone go head-to-head with a tough Oval Invincibles side that includes Australian bowler Jason Behrendorff.

programme.title: T20 Mini AUS v SA
programme.desc: Australia's impressive lineup gets even better with the return of Travis Head and Josh Hazlewood, while South Africa aims for an upset in Darwin.

programme.title: The Hundred Mini
programme.desc: Northern Superchargers travel to take on Trent Rockets and Marcus Stoinis's bowling attack.

programme.title: T20 AUS v SA
programme.desc: Game 2: With Tim David's fantastic performance securing a 1-0 series lead, Australia now aims to extend its winning streak to 10 consecutive T20 victories.

programme.title: The Hundred Mini
programme.desc: The Manchester Originals' bowlers will have their work cut out for them against London Spirit who will be looking to David Warner for an explosive start.

programme.title: T20 Mini AUS v SA
programme.desc: Game 2: With Tim David's fantastic performance securing a 1-0 series lead, Australia now aims to extend its winning streak to 10 consecutive T20 victories.

programme.title: The Hundred Women's Mini
programme.desc: Beth Mooney and Sophie Ecclestone face London Spirit’s powerhouse Grace Harris in Manchester.

programme.title: T20 AUS v SA
programme.desc: Game 2: With Tim David's fantastic performance securing a 1-0 series lead, Australia now aims to extend its winning streak to 10 consecutive T20 victories.

programme.title: The Hundred Mini
programme.desc: The Manchester Originals' bowlers will have their work cut out for them against London Spirit who will be looking to David Warner for an explosive start.

programme.title: T20 Mini AUS v SA
programme.desc: Game 2: With Tim David's fantastic performance securing a 1-0 series lead, Australia now aims to extend its winning streak to 10 consecutive T20 victories.

programme.title: The Hundred Women's Mini
programme.desc: Beth Mooney and Sophie Ecclestone face London Spirit’s powerhouse Grace Harris in Manchester.

programme.title: The Hundred Mini
programme.desc: The battle at Edgbaston will see the Birmingham Phoenix's Liam Livingstone go head-to-head with a tough Oval Invincibles side that includes Australian bowler Jason Behrendorff.

programme.title: T20 Mini AUS v SA
programme.desc: Game 2: With Tim David's fantastic performance securing a 1-0 series lead, Australia now aims to extend its winning streak to 10 consecutive T20 victories.

programme.title: The Hundred Women's Mini
programme.desc: Australian blockbuster takes center stage in Birmingham as Ellyse Perry's Phoenix go head-to-head with Meg Lanning's Oval Invincibles.

programme.title: T20 AUS v SA
programme.desc: Game 2: With Tim David's fantastic performance securing a 1-0 series lead, Australia now aims to extend its winning streak to 10 consecutive T20 victories.

programme.desc: Game 2: With Tim David's fantastic performance securing a 1-0 series lead, Australia now aims to extend its winning streak to 10 consecutive T20 victories.

programme.title: The Hundred Women's Mini
programme.desc: Australian blockbuster takes center stage in Birmingham as Ellyse Perry's Phoenix go head-to-head with Meg Lanning's Oval Invincibles.

programme.title: Hundred W
programme.desc: Southern Brave with Sophie Devine, take on Annabel Sutherland's Superchargers at The Rose Bowl.

programme.title: Hundred
programme.desc: Southern Brave's Utilita Bowl fortress will be put to the test by the Northern Superchargers.

programme.title: Hundred
programme.desc: All eyes will be on Australian star Steve Smith as Welsh Fire battles the Manchester Originals at home.

programme.desc: The battle at Edgbaston will see the Birmingham Phoenix's Liam Livingstone go head-to-head with a tough Oval Invincibles side that includes Australian bowler Jason Behrendorff.

programme.title: The Hundred Women's Mini
programme.desc: Jess Jonassen's Welsh Fire light up Sophia Garden against Beth Mooney's Manchester Originals.

programme.title: Hundred W
programme.desc: Grace Harris's London Spirit take on the spin of Ash Gardner and Alana King’s Trent Rockets at the historic Lords.

programme.title: THE HUNDRED Men's - M10 Hlts
programme.desc: The back-to-back reigning Men's Hundred champions Oval Invincibles travel to Liam Livingstone's winless Phoenix. Sam Billings' side have two wins from two in their 2025 defence. (12.08)

programme.title: THE HUNDRED Women's - M9 Hlts
programme.desc: In the Women's Hundred, Manchester Originals compete with London Spirit. (11.08)

programme.title: The Hundred
programme.desc: The back-to-back reigning Men's Hundred champions Oval Invincibles travel to Liam Livingstone's winless Phoenix. Sam Billings' side have two wins from two in their 2025 defence.

programme.title: THE HUNDRED Men's - M9 Hlts
programme.desc: A match from the 2025 Men's Hundred between Manchester Originals and London Spirit. (11.08)

programme.title: THE HUNDRED Women's - M9 Hlts
programme.desc: In the Women's Hundred, Manchester Originals compete with London Spirit. (11.08)

programme.title: The Hundred
programme.desc: After falling short again, the Oval Invincibles go to Birmingham on the back of consecutive defeats. Ellyse Perry's Phoenix also target a return to form after defeat to Southern Brave.

programme.title: THE HUNDRED Men's - M5 Hlts
programme.desc: Back-to-back Men's Hundred champions Oval Invincibles are back in action at the Oval, as Rashid Khan and co take on Jimmy Anderson and the Manchester Originals. (09.08)

programme.title: THE HUNDRED Women's - M7 Hlts
programme.desc: In the Women's Hundred, Georgia Adams' Southern Brave - who got off to a winning start in their opening game - compete with Ellyse Perry's Birmingham Phoenix in Southampton. (10.08)

programme.title: THE HUNDRED Men's - M8 Hlts
programme.desc: A match from the 2025 Men's Hundred between Trent Rockets and Northern Superchargers. England stars Zak Crawley and Harry Brook propelled the Superchargers to victory on Thursday. (10.08)

programme.title: THE HUNDRED Women's - M8 Hlts
programme.desc: In the Women's Hundred, Trent Rockets face Northern Superchargers at Trent Bridge. Superchargers captain Hollie Armitage hit 34* en route to a 47-run win over Welsh Fire previously. (10.08)

programme.title: THE HUNDRED Men's - M10 Hlts
programme.desc: The back-to-back reigning Men's Hundred champions Oval Invincibles travel to Liam Livingstone's winless Phoenix. Sam Billings' side have two wins from two in their 2025 defence. (12.08)

programme.title: THE HUNDRED Men's - M6 Hlts
programme.desc: Steve Smith and Welsh Fire attempt to pick themselves up after defeat to the Superchargers, taking on David Warner and the London Spirit - who also faltered in their opener. (09.08)

programme.title: THE HUNDRED Women's - M10 Hlts
programme.desc: After falling short again, the Invincibles go to Birmingham on the back of consecutive defeats. Ellyse Perry's Phoenix also target a return to form after defeat to Southern Brave. (12.08)

programme.title: THE HUNDRED Men's - M10 Hlts
programme.desc: The back-to-back reigning Men's Hundred champions Oval Invincibles travel to Liam Livingstone's winless Phoenix. Sam Billings' side have two wins from two in their 2025 defence. (12.08)

programme.title: Live The Hundred
programme.desc: In the Women's Hundred, Southern Brave compete with Northern Superchargers.

programme.title: Live The Hundred
programme.desc: A match from the 2025 Men's Hundred between Southern Brave and Northern Superchargers.

programme.title: Live The Hundred

programme.title: The Hundred
programme.desc: In the Women's Hundred, London Spirit compete with Trent Rockets.

programme.title: Haseen Dillruba
programme.desc: When Rani's husband is found dead, she becomes the prime suspect. Subsequently, the investigation uncovers hidden truths about their marriage.

programme.title: Lake Placid 3
programme.desc: A game warden's mischievous son discovers a nest of baby crocodiles and starts feeding them. However, the reptiles quickly grow in size and attack everyone around them.

programme.title: Extraaa Storiez
programme.desc: The host presents various snippets of information and behind the scenes from the sets of 'K.G.F: Chapter 2', a 2022 Kannada film.

programme.title: A Gentleman: Sundar, Susheel, Risky
programme.desc: Gaurav, a young man living in Miami, USA, wishes to settle down and marry his girlfriend. However, his plans are put on hold when he travels to Mumbai and is mistaken for a spy.

programme.title: Saheb Biwi Aur Gangster 3
programme.desc: Aditya returns from jail and tries to reclaim his political legacy. On meeting London-based gangster Uday, the war for the survival of the richest and the shrewdest begins.

programme.title: Behen Hogi Teri
programme.desc: Neighbours Gattu and Binniy are in love. But according to their localty, girls from the neighbourhood are to be considered sisters. How will their love story hold up?

programme.title: Fitoor
programme.desc: Modern adaptation of Charles Dickens' Great Expectations; a poor but talented boy falls in love with a girl from an affluent family.

programme.title: Daddy
programme.desc: Arun Gawli, a young man, is forced to turn to crime for making a livelihood. However, what starts with a simple 'matka' gambling ring, soon turns into a full-fledged criminal network.

programme.title: Batti Gul Meter Chalu
programme.desc: The life of three friends takes a tragic turn due to an inflated electricity bill, which leads to a courtroom drama and social awakening.

programme.title: Baaghi: Rebels in Love
programme.desc: A martial artist faces his biggest test when he has to travel to Bangkok to rescue the woman he loves from the clutches of his romantic rival.

programme.title: Wedding Pullav
programme.desc: Karan and Anushka are best friends. When Karan marries Riya, Anushka is going to marry Jay. Do fate and love have a twist in store for them?

programme.title: Badla
programme.desc: When a woman is accused of killing her lover, a renowned lawyer is hired -- but the more they try to untangle the truth, the more convoluted it becomes.

programme.title: Daddy
programme.desc: Arun Gawli, a young man, is forced to turn to crime for making a livelihood. However, what starts with a simple 'matka' gambling ring, soon turns into a full-fledged criminal network.

programme.title: Batti Gul Meter Chalu
programme.desc: The life of three friends takes a tragic turn due to an inflated electricity bill, which leads to a courtroom drama and social awakening.

programme.title: Baaghi: Rebels in Love
programme.desc: A martial artist faces his biggest test when he has to travel to Bangkok to rescue the woman he loves from the clutches of his romantic rival.

programme.title: Wedding Pullav
programme.desc: Karan and Anushka are best friends. When Karan marries Riya, Anushka is going to marry Jay. Do fate and love have a twist in store for them?

programme.title: Badla
programme.desc: When a woman is accused of killing her lover, a renowned lawyer is hired -- but the more they try to untangle the truth, the more convoluted it becomes.

programme.title: Pralay: the Destroyer
programme.desc: When a criminal gang slaughters an entire family, the baby survives. He is taken in by a family and the forces of nature work together to bring him face to face with the gang again when he grows up.

programme.title: Baar Baar Dekho
programme.desc: The highs and lows of a romantic relationship are examined through flashbacks and flash-forwards.

programme.title: Saand Ki Aankh
programme.desc: This biographical movie narrates the story of Chandro and Prakashi Tomar, who defied ageism and patriarchy to take up shooting in their 60s.

programme.title: Vasudha
programme.desc: Though they have different perspectives, the amiable and endearing Vasudha works as a housekeeper in Chandrika, a business tycoon's house. S01 E290.

programme.desc: Ek Nazar

programme.desc: Pragya and Abhi find their lives entwined in a cruel twist of fate. However, despite their initial aversion towards one another, they fall in love and fight to be together against all odds. S01 E3152.

programme.title: Jagriti - Ek Nayi Subah
programme.desc: Akash vows to distance himself from Sapna, regardless of Suraj's actions. Concurrently, Kalikant forcibly evicts the nurse, scheming his imminent return. S01 E333.
